channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'We’re not selling and we’re not giving way': Lone farmer defeats Tennessee's TVA as US electricity giant grapples with exploding demand from AI-fuelled data centers from Google and Elon Musk's xAI, encouraged by slow legislature
item.description: A Revolutionary War era farm in Tennessee blocked TVA's power line using social media, petitions, and help from country star John Rich.

item.title: Farewell, Jeeves: Ask.com shuts down
item.description: Owner IAC says it's discontinuing its search business.
